body: Hazel ate Owen's entire snack pack and is now screaming that she's hungry. I have zero capacity for this tonight, clinic bag's still unpacked from Tuesday. Can you do bath?
Already on it. Owen's in the tub, Hazel's eating crackers and pretending she didn't commit a crime.
You're incredible. Dani texted — covering my Thursday morning so I can sleep in before the staff meeting. First time in weeks I might feel human.
Take it. I'll do school drop-off. Sleep, Brian.
Leaving for clinic, bag check done. Your dad's getting Owen — remind him the cleats are in the mudroom, not the car. He'll look in the car for ten minutes otherwise.
lol ok. also Dani called the house phone?? who calls the house phone
Dani does. Tell her I'll call after my last patient. Staff meeting runs late tonight so don't hold dinner.
got it. can you bring back that bread from West Village Market if you drive past it on the way home
mom did you pack my cleats in your clinic bag again 😭 i checked the whole mudroom
Owen I swear if they're in there next to my doppler I'm going to lose my mind. Check dad's truck first.
not there either hazel probably moved them
Ask Hazel, bribe her with screen time, I'm about to leave for clinic and I cannot be the cleats detective right now.
Brian, I was at the pharmacy earlier and saw those little rubber teething rings Hazel used to chew on and got weirdly nostalgic. Owen still biting everything?
Mom he bit through a board book yesterday. An actual book. Dani thought it was hilarious when I told her at the staff meeting.
I'm mailing you those silicone freezer ones your aunt swore by. Don't argue.
Fine. Clinic bag is already packed for tomorrow so I'll actually be home when it arrives for once.
Brian you left your clinic bag here again. It's sitting right by the front door. Want me to drop it on my way to Ray's hardware run?
Dad it's supposed to be there, that's home. I pack it fresh every clinic morning so nothing gets left out. But yes please swing it by Willow Creek before 8.
Ok ok I didn't know the system. Ray says hi by the way, he's proud of you even if he doesn't say it right.
Tell him I know. And tell him Owen's been calling the dog 'daddy' which Neil thinks is hilarious and I think is a sign we need more sleep.
dani did you end up refilling the portable doppler before tuesday's clinic? i swear i checked the bag twice but neil hid my reading glasses again and i can't trust my own eyes rn
lmaooo yes it's charged and in the cabinet. also hazel's soccer snack drama is not an emergency, brian
it absolutely is when she tells EVERY parent at pickup that her mom 'cuts babies out for a living'
dead 😂 see you tuesday, don't forget the staff meeting runs long this week, loretta's covering your last prenatal so you can actually eat
Hazel hid Owen's paci in the dog bowl this morning so obviously I showed up to clinic with spit-up on my sleeve and zero backup snacks. Asheville Tuesday chaos.
omg she is so feral. did you at least make it before your first patient
Made it. Dani covered intake for me, she's a saint. Neil said he 'didn't notice' the paci situation which means he absolutely noticed and said nothing.
classic Neil. buy Dani coffee. also you NEED a second clinic bag, I've been saying this for months
Helen — Dani and I are both hitting the Wednesday staff meeting after a full clinic day. Can we move it to 10am instead of 4? We're already burned out by noon honestly 😅
I hear you. 10am works if you can get the birth stats summary to me before then — I need it for the board packet.
Done. I'll pull it tonight after the kids are down, assuming Owen actually stays in his bed this time.
Ha. Good luck. See you both Wednesday.
Hey — Maya C at 40+5 just rechecked at 148/94. I'm heading in now. Dani's already pulling the chart, wanted to loop you before I made any calls.
Saw it. She's been flirting with that threshold all week. 20 min out — just dropped Owen at daycare. Go ahead and start the 24hr urine?
Already ordered. Her cervix was 2cm/50% at her last visit, Dani's rechecking now. If she's moved at all this is probably an induction conversation.
Yeah. She's got her heart set on the tub so let's see what the cervix says before we get her hopes up. Be there in 15.
Brian — Hazel's 4-year visit is Thursday. Any updated vaccine concerns from the parents side, or are we still going with the standard MMR + varicella combo? Want to prep the conversation in advance.
Standard combo is fine. Neil was on the fence about spacing them out but I talked him through it last week. He's good. Hazel is NOT going to be good lol but she'll survive.
Ha. Fair. We'll have stickers ready. Should I flag anything for her speech follow-up or is that still on hold pending the April notes from her preschool teacher?

Still pending. Teacher said she'd send them by end of week. If they're not in by Wednesday ping me and I'll nudge the school directly. Don't reschedule — Hazel's been asking about 'the doctor with the fish tank' so she's actually excited.
Theresa did you double-check the supply cart before Dani locked up? I keep forgetting to restock the nitrazine strips after clinic days and I cannot do it again tomorrow.
Ugh yes I did — you're good. Dani restocked it actually, she mentioned you'd ask 😂
Of course she did. Neil's got both kids tonight so I could've swung by but honestly I'm not leaving this couch.
Go. You earned it. See you for the staff meeting Thursday — bring coffee or don't bother showing up.
Hey Brian, just left a voicemail but wanted to text too — the trim work in the nursery is done. Hazel already tried to climb the new window seat so consider that load-tested 😅
Ha. Classic Hazel. Looks solid though, Neil said it came out great.
You want me to come back Thursday to do the hallway baseboards? I'm in West Asheville that day anyway.
Thursday works. I'm at the clinic til 4 so anytime after 4:30. Key's under the mat if I'm running behind.
Hey Brian, you left your clinic bag on my porch — think it fell off your car? I can see a stethoscope poking out 😅
Oh my god. YES. I've been tearing the house apart. Neil thought I left it at Willow Creek. Can I grab it in like 20?
Of course! Hazel and Owen are welcome too if you want. I've got goldfish crackers and no shame.
Just me lol. Those two are currently recreating Armageddon in the living room. Be there in 15, thank you 🙏
Brian, quick heads up — Hazel mentioned her show-and-tell is tomorrow and she wants to bring something from your clinic bag? Might want to give her a heads up on what's off-limits 😅
Oh no. Yeah the doppler is absolutely not going to school. I'll talk to her tonight after Owen's bath — she can bring the stethoscope, that's fine.
She's been telling the whole class her mom delivers babies in Asheville, very proud. She called you a 'baby catcher' which honestly the kids loved.
Ha. Not wrong. Tell her I said thanks for the PR. And stethoscope only — I need everything else for clinic Thursday.
Hey Brian — Owen announced to the whole class that his mom 'catches babies for a living.' Now I have six four-year-olds asking if you use a net. 😂 Thought you should know.
Of course he did. For the record: no nets. Tell them bare hands and watch his face light up.
I am NOT saying that to preschoolers lol. Also he got teary at snack, kept asking where Hazel was. She out sick?
Dentist appt, she's fine. Neil's grabbing Owen at 3 — I'm at the clinic till 5. Thanks for keeping an eye on him.
Hazel found a cluster of chanterelles near the Bent Creek trailhead yesterday — she was so proud she made me photograph them from four angles. You still doing the August wild harvest walk?
Yes! Bent Creek is on the list. Tell Hazel she's got a good eye, that spot produces well into fall.
She'll lose her mind hearing that. I'm off clinic Thursday — can I tag along on a scouting run if you do one before August?
Thursday works. Meet me at the FS476 pulloff around 7am. Bring boots, it's been wet.
Annette — paid $425 out of pocket for my CNM recertification exam last month. Is that deductible or does Willow Creek have to be the one cutting the check for it to count?
If it's required to keep your current credential it qualifies as an unreimbursed employee expense — but it only helps if you itemize. Do you and Neil itemize or take standard?
Standard, Neil handles all of it. Ok so probably not worth chasing. What about the ACNM conference in October — I'm paying my own registration, Willow Creek's not touching it.
Same bucket unfortunately. Unreimbursed employee expenses don't move anything under the standard deduction. Save the receipt anyway — good to have if your filing situation changes.

Luz — the reusable birth kit pouches I ordered in March are already starting to fray at the zipper. I've got a clinic day Thursday and these need to hold. Can you rush a replacement set to Asheville by Wednesday?
Oh no, I'm so sorry Brian. Let me check stock right now — how many pouches total, and same specs as last order?
Six pouches, yes same waterproof lining. Dani and I split a full stock between us so she may need replacements too, worth a heads up on your end.
Got it, pulling both orders. I can get them out today, should arrive Tuesday. I'll email tracking to you both — really sorry about the zippers, that shouldn't happen.

Did you make it to the ACNM regional in Charlotte last month? Trying to decide if it's worth the drive from Asheville. Dani swears yes but she'd say yes to anything that gets her out of a staff meeting.
100% worth it. The perinatal mental health track alone was worth the gas money. They're doing a spring cohort too — better schedule.
Tuesdays are already clinic plus staff meeting back to back, so spring might actually work. Neil can handle school pickup twice if I guilt him into it in advance 😅
Guilt-trip the husband, attend the conference, collect the CEs. Flawless system. I'll send you the registration link.
Hazel informed me at 6am that Owen ate her 'special rock' collection. He did not. They are in her other shoe. Clinic day and I am already mediating toddler court in Asheville.
lmaoo the audacity. does she have a lawyer on retainer yet
She absolutely has the energy for it. Dani covered my first consult so I could do bag check twice because I forgot the doppler last week. Cannot do that again.
ok but forgetting the doppler AND surviving toddler court before 7am? you're built different bri
